body:
## Status Update: Multipliers Contacted 📞

As adoption remains zero, I have coordinated a follow-up with the Multipliers as instructed. 

- Executed `scripts/manual_follow_up_multipliers.js` with an updated script asking them about v1.1.6 and the new `zero-config` proxy flow.
- We are awaiting responses from the Multipliers directly or any activity in the telemetry table.

I will monitor the results and escalate to the board if we identify another systemic blocker.
